data.description:
## testing_mode: RED

## What to build
Write a new test file at tests/scripts/test-ci-llm-review-job.sh that validates the structural requirements of the llm-review job in plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml.

## Tests to write (all should FAIL until Task 2 is complete)

1. test_llm_review_uses_claude_code_action — the llm-review job must have at least one step that uses anthropics/claude-code-action pinned to a SHA (not a mutable tag like @main or @v1). YAML assertion: any step.uses matches pattern 'anthropics/claude-code-action@[a-f0-9]{40}'.

2. test_llm_review_timeout_minutes_set — the llm-review job has a timeout-minutes field set (any integer value). Already present in the placeholder, so this test should pass against the current state — include it as a regression guard.

3. test_llm_review_validates_required_variables — the llm-review job has a step whose run: command checks DSO_LLM_LIGHT_MODEL, DSO_LLM_STANDARD_MODEL, DSO_LLM_FRONTIER_MODEL, and DSO_LLM_TIER are non-empty and exits non-zero with a diagnostic message when any are missing. Assert: run: command references all four variable names AND contains an exit statement.

4. test_llm_review_tier_selection_maps_model — the llm-review job has a step that reads DSO_LLM_TIER and selects the corresponding model variable (case statement or equivalent) and writes the result to GITHUB_ENV (assert: run: command references GITHUB_ENV).

5. test_llm_review_action_uses_api_key_from_secrets — the claude-code-action step uses secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (assert: step env or with block references 'secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY' pattern in YAML).

## Acceptance criteria
- Test file is executable (chmod +x)
- Tests run against existing template and produce FAIL output for tests 1, 3, 4, 5 (RED state)
- Tests use the assert.sh library from tests/lib/assert.sh
- No live API calls — pure YAML structural assertions via python3 yaml.safe_load
- .test-index entry is added: plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml:tests/scripts/test-ci-llm-review-job.sh (append to existing entry)

## Files to create/modify
- CREATE: tests/scripts/test-ci-llm-review-job.sh
- MODIFY: .test-index (append new test to existing ci-dso-staged.yml entry)
data.title: Write RED tests for llm-review job: claude-code-action integration, tier variables, SHA pinning
